title: 'It will definitely form part of our portfolio of wearables': Even though it wasn't at this year's Unpacked, a top Samsung exec hints a Galaxy Ring 2 is being worked on
summary: After all, the Oura Ring 5 was released this year, so I thought Samsung would be looking to follow up its smash-hit Galaxy Ring with a Galaxy Ring 2. And the Galaxy Ring has certainly got fans inside Samsung's executive team.
caption: output/2026-07-22/it-will-definitely-form-part-of-our-portfolio-of-wearables-even-though.txt
